prestazioni: AM20 6.0L V12 (AE31) engine: Full titanium internals upgrade with Carillo H-beam connecting rods, JE Pistons 12.5:1 forged pistons, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance to handle 1,000+ HP on E85 fuel. Pair with a custom dry-sump system by Dailey Engineering for sustained high-RPM stability.

Forced induction: Twin Precision Turbo PT6766CE turbochargers with custom Inconel turbine housings and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, mated to a bespoke air-to-water intercooler setup by PWR (Australia) with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps and ID1700x injectors for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain: Xtrac P1227 6-speed sequential transaxle with a carbon-fiber driveshaft and a Tilton triple-plate clutch, paired with a Quaife ATB differential and a custom 4.10:1 final drive ratio for optimized acceleration. Chassis reinforcement via a T45 steel roll cage by Safety Devices with integrated mounting points for the transaxle.
estetica: Full carbon-fiber bodywork replacement using pre-preg autoclave-cured panels by Composite Resources, including a custom front splitter with integrated dive planes and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch).

Custom 20-inch forged OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels in a 9.5x20 (front) and 12x20 (rear) staggered setup, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 R20 front, 325/25 R20 rear) with a bespoke TPMS system by Stack.

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display, and a bespoke titanium shift knob by BBI Autosport. Exterior lighting upgraded to Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs with a custom DRL delete kit.
